examples: She crossed out his name from the list.
Please cross out the wrong answers.
He crossed out the mistake with a pen.
Cross out the old price and write the new one.
I had to cross out the whole paragraph.
example_translate: Она вычеркнула его имя из списка.
Вычеркни старую цену и напиши новую.
cross out.synonyms: Вычеркивать, зачеркивать текст или имя - strike out, delete, erase, cancel
